note: Independent-verification input for G1 (T=2016,k=5). Recompute precision@k over each order (index lists over the same frame) and the two co-primary paired-diff contrasts with a gene-AND-disease two-way-clustered bootstrap (resample the n_genes gene-clusters and n_diseases disease-clusters with replacement; a pair's weight = count(gene)*count(disease); prec@20 point + 2.5/97.5 percentile CI over 2000 resamples, seed 20260712). Expect C_broad=wayfinder-lit_rarity, C_mech=wayfinder-disease_hop_only; a CI spanning 0 is a null.
